name: OwnedGiftRegular
description: Describes a regular gift owned by a user or a chat.

fields.name: owned_gift_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the gift for the bot; for gifts received on behalf of business accounts only

fields.name: sender_user
fields.description: Sender of the gift if it is a known user

fields.name: send_date
fields.description: Date the gift was sent in Unix time

fields.name: text
fields.description: Text of the message that was added to the gift

fields.name: entities
fields.description: Special entities that appear in the text

fields.name: is_private
fields.description: True, if the sender and gift text are shown only to the gift receiver; otherwise, everyone will be able to see them

fields.name: is_saved
fields.description: True, if the gift is displayed on the account's profile page; for gifts received on behalf of business accounts only

fields.name: can_be_upgraded
fields.description: True, if the gift can be upgraded to a unique gift; for gifts received on behalf of business accounts only

fields.name: was_refunded
fields.description: True, if the gift was refunded and isn't available anymore

fields.name: convert_star_count
fields.description: Number of Telegram Stars that can be claimed by the receiver instead of the gift; omitted if the gift cannot be converted to Telegram Stars; for gifts received on behalf of business accounts only

fields.name: prepaid_upgrade_star_count
fields.description: Number of Telegram Stars that were paid for the ability to upgrade the gift

fields.name: is_upgrade_separate
fields.description: True, if the gift's upgrade was purchased after the gift was sent; for gifts received on behalf of business accounts only

fields.name: unique_gift_number
fields.description: Unique number reserved for this gift when upgraded. See the number field in UniqueGift.
